news.title: May Day protest: Graduate workers, Cori Bush rally in support of international students, ArtSci PhD programs
news.summary_en: The Washington University Graduate Workers Union (WUGWU) organized a demonstration last Friday, May 1, to protest University funding cuts to College of Arts & Sciences graduate programs and demand increased protections for international students as part of nationwide May Day rallies and strikes calling for labor rights, among other causes.
news.author: Tim Mellman, Tanvi Gorre, Laurel Wang
